name: Maple Oatmeal Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. Add the yeast to the bowl.
2. Pour in the warm water.
3. Stir until combined.
4. Add the quick-cooking oats, bread flour, and salt.
5. Mix until a dough forms.
6. Stir in the maple syrup and cooking oil.
7. Transfer the batter to your mixing machine and process according to manufacturer's instructions.
8. Turn off the mixer when done.
